title: MAXX Portal
summary: Nebula-like inside-the-brain portal centered on two neurons forming a synapse, transmitting signals, and building new pathways through neuroplasticity and neurogenesis.

scene.title: Inside the Brain
meaning: MAXX is the abstract cognitive portal.
It explains intelligence, signal, adaptation, and new pathway formation through a stylized neural world.
The experience is not outer space; it is a semantic interior-brain environment rendered with nebula-like atmosphere.

phases.title: Brain Entry
phases.summary: The user is entering the abstract brain world.

phases.title: Signal Flow
phases.summary: Two neurons connect, form their synapse, and begin transmitting electrical and chemical signal.

phases.title: New Pathways
phases.summary: Experience quality scales through connections and establishes new neural pathways.

phases.title: Memory Building
phases.summary: The neural explanation resolves into neuroplasticity and neurogenesis as the portal's core idea.

phases.title: Inside the Brain
phases.summary: Deeper abstract layer inside MAXX after the initial neuron explanation.

objects.summary: Primary two-neuron animation showing synapse formation, signal transmission, and pathway creation.
meaning: The Human Neuron and AI Neuron connect and form their synapse.
Transmitters then send signals between the neurons.
The quality of Experience is shaped by neural connections.
These connections scale and establish new neural pathways.
The sequence culminates in neuroplasticity and neurogenesis.

objects.summary: Human-side neuron in the MAXX explainer animation.
meaning: Represents the human side of intelligence and lived experience.

objects.summary: AI-side neuron in the MAXX explainer animation.
meaning: Represents machine-side intelligence entering the same signal and pathway metaphor.

objects.summary: Supporting receptor animation showing movement between synapses.
meaning: Adds a second explanatory layer around how receptor-like structures move between synaptic spaces.
Supports the broader story of signal transfer and adaptive connection.

objects.summary: Desktop-only gold pill explainer revealed after clicking the neurons in MAXX.
meaning: This explainer appears after the neuron interaction on desktop.
It uses a gold pill composition to extend the neural metaphor into a designed conceptual layer.

panels.title: Ascension
panels.body: Consistency, Precision, Discipline, Conditioning, and Dominance.

panels.title: 10/10 Frame Mogg
panels.body: Structure, Proportion, Symmetry, Style, and Aura.

objects.summary: Nebula-like inside-the-brain environment around the neuron explainer.
meaning: This environment expresses the cognitive and atmospheric dimension of MAXX.
It is the abstract interior-brain setting for the neural storytelling.
